name: swift-toolkit
description: Swift/Apple development toolkit with specialized agents for architecture, development, code review, refactoring, testing, diagnostics, security, and project initialization

metadata.description: Swift/Apple development toolkit covering iOS, macOS, SPM packages. Includes architect, developer, reviewer, refactorer, tester, diagnostics, security, init agents. Covers UIKit, SwiftUI, Swift Concurrency (async/await), Combine, RxSwift, Swinject DI, and patterns (MVVM, VIPER, Clean Architecture, Coordinator).

plugins.description: Swift/Apple development toolkit with architect, developer, reviewer, refactorer, tester, diagnostics, security, and init agents plus task management skills
